title: ICSI UDIN Amnesty Scheme, 2026: Last Date Extended!
content:
# ICSI UDIN Amnesty Scheme, 2026: Last Date Extended!

Ek important update hai for all Practicing Company Secretaries (PCS)! The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne UDIN Amnesty Scheme, 2026 ki last date extend kar di hai.

The ICSI UDIN Amnesty Scheme, 2026, jise "Never Before, Never After Scheme" bhi kaha ja raha hai, members ko allow karti hai ki woh apne pending UDINs generate kar sakein, existing active UDINs ki details rectify kar sakein, aur unutilised UDINs ko revoke kar sakein.

*   **Old Due Date:** The scheme was initially open until April 15, 2026.
*   **New Due Date:** Ab, is scheme ka benefit uthane ke liye final date **April 20, 2026** tak extend kar di gayi hai.

This extension provides a valuable opportunity for all members to regularize their professional records and ensure compliance with the UDIN Guidelines.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://stimulate.icsi.edu/udin)

*Published on: 18 April 2026*
